prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (hybridized for the **JL473QEP 1.5L TGDI** engine) with a **Precision Turbo 46mm wastegate** and **Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valve** to support 300+ HP on E85 fuel, paired with a **PTP 3.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping kit** and **GReddy Type-RS intercooler** (core dimensions: 600x300x67mm) for optimized intake temps under sustained boost (target: 22 psi peak, 18 psi sustained).

Full **Motec M150 ECU standalone management system** with **Bosch Motorsport 0280158802 1000cc/min high-impedance injectors** and **AEM 30-2056 wideband O2 sensor**, calibrated for **JE 8.5:1 forged pistons** (part #JE261850) and **Manley 2618 alloy connecting rods** (part #14406-4) to handle 9,000 RPM safely. Includes **AP Racing CP8840-1000 front brake calipers** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** (356mm x 32mm) and **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** for heat management under track use.

Custom **3.5-inch titanium exhaust system** by **Milltek Sport** (cat-back, 1.5mm wall thickness) with **Scorpion 400-cell race catalytic converters** and **Akrapovič titanium exhaust tips** (dual 100mm outlets), paired with a **Vibrant 1795 resonator** to eliminate drone at 3,500–4,500 RPM. Engine bay reinforced with **Whiteline front strut tower brace** (part #WSB019) and **SuperPro poly bushings** (part #SPF0119K) for chassis rigidity under lateral G-forces.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (UNI-T-specific, part #RB-CU21) with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** (25mm extended flares, 3K twill weave) and **AIT Racing front lip spoiler** (part #AIT-CU21FL) in **PPG Toyota Supra White (040)** with **3M Matte Black (101-C) vinyl accents** on the roof, mirror caps, and rear diffuser. Includes **OEM+ LED taillight overlays** by **VLand** (part #VL-TL2101) with sequential turn signals.

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2** wheels (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x10.5 +35 rear) in **Gunmetal Bronze** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (265/30/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Fender gaps rolled and pulled using **Eastwood Pro Fender Roller** (part #30700) and **Hydra Hose Clamp Puller** (part #HYD-1000) for aggressive fitment without spacers.

**Seibon Carbon CS-II hood** (part #CF-HD-21CHUNIT) with **hidden tow hooks** (front: **Tyger Auto TG-HK5000B**, rear: **Cusco Type-RS**) and **custom LED underglow kit** by **Oracle Lighting** (part #5874-0021) with **RGB+Amber sequential patterns**, controlled via **Alpine iLX-F509 Halo9 head unit** with **Apple CarPlay/Android Auto integration**. Interior features **Recaro SPG XL seats** (part #381 200 54) in **Alcantara/Leatherette (Black/Red)** with **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses** (part #1036).
